@sample @demo @reference: DL-13 visual-diff check (I-17B mobile UI verification).
comparator_version: pixelmatch ^5.x (exact version owned by DL-11/I-17 implementation; semantic interface locked by DL-13)
policy: zero unexpected unapproved visual diff after normalization

thresholds.antialiasing_tolerance: explicit-only; recorded per-row in evidence; default 0

forbidden_masks.reason: normalization must not hide missing elements (DL-13)
normalization must not hide content clipping
normalization must not hide element overlap
normalization must not hide accessibility failures
normalization must not hide layout breakage

advisory_boundary: screenshot-only or LLM visual-taste opinion is advisory-only and may NOT be the sole hard block (DL-13 §Deterministic vs advisory).
